testSummary: broadcast 37 tests (24 unit + 13 integration on real PG localhost:5433) all green. Full cold suite 34/34 turbo tasks, 0 cached. No regression in phases 2-8. NOTE: the implement agent dropped on a transient socket error after writing all files; orchestrator fixed a test-teardown FK-ordering bug in 2 integration files (delete broadcasts before email_templates, broadcasts.template_id FK) and verified.
notes: core.ts pure: buildBroadcastDedupeKey (broadcast:{broadcast_id}:{profile_id}), buildBroadcastOutboxInsert (ON CONFLICT (dedupe_key) DO NOTHING, workspace_id $1), chunk, isValidBroadcastTransition, buildBroadcastStatusUpdate (compare-and-set), isScheduleDue, buildDueScheduledBroadcastsQuery, buildDispatchEnqueueMessage ({outbox_id}, no workspace_id). send.ts runBroadcast: workspace_id from broadcast row, resolveAudience at send time, chunk batches, per-batch outbox insert in runInWorkspaceTx + enqueue, status sending->sent. Two-layered idempotency proven: broadcast UNIQUE dedupe_key (retry/concurrent -> one outbox row per recipient) + dispatcher atomic claim. Audience resolved at send time (mutation-after-creation test). Chain test reuses real dispatchOutbox: suppressed recipient skipped, SES not called, messages_log only for sent. Reused @cdp/segments resolveAudience + @cdp/service-dispatcher (no re-implementation). SQS/EventBridge mocked at boundary; counting fake SES in chain; DB never mocked. Scope: §9A only.
